Adobe-Illustrator.title: Adobe Illustrator
Adobe-Illustrator.content:
Adobe Illustrator has always been a bit elusive to me. Despite that, you’ll notice it plays a significant role in my workflow.
The reason is simple: it’s an exceptional vector editing software. While I primarily create assets using 3D or Photoshop, Illustrator comes into play for generating patterns and symbols, as well as editing existing vector images.
Moreover, Adobe Illustrator is instrumental in translating 2D concepts into 3D models using splines.

Adobe-Photoshop.title: Adobe Photoshop
Adobe-Photoshop.content:
Each image within this collection shares a connection to Adobe Photoshop, serving as the primary crucible from which the final artwork emerges.
Additionally, Adobe Photoshop is an integral tool utilized alongside Adobe After Effects in nearly every animation project I undertake.
My journey with Adobe Photoshop began with version 2 back in 1998. Having been accustomed to Deluxe Paint during my Amiga days, I found Photoshop to be remarkably intuitive to learn. As I delved deeper into its capabilities, particularly in 2011, I began to unlock its full potential, forever transforming the trajectory of my art.

Alanya.title: Alanya
Alanya.content:
Alanya was a transformative 2.5-year journey for us, a period where we reconnected with family on the Mediterranean coast. It was here that we consciously conceived and experienced a freebirth with our second child.
Although Alanya was not initially ideal for us, it provided comfort during a crucial time in our lives.
It was during our time in Alanya that I truly began to embrace and assert my sovereignty, separating the essential from the extraneous and questioning much of the programming in my life.
Alanya became a fertile ground for creativity, where I produced some of my most widespread and influential pieces. I also delved even deeper into the realms of Universal Transmissions, expanding my artistic and spiritual horizons.

Alaçatı.title: Alaçatı
Alaçatı.content:
This period marked a bridge for us, a transition from the bustling metropolis to smaller towns. We found a place where we stayed for six months, which became a pivotal point for me. It was here that I delved deeper into the Universal Transmissions project and lucid dreaming, as well as meditation in general.
Although this phase saw the least amount of work being done, it remains a magical period in my life—a time of introspection and exploration.

Ardhanarishvara---UNION.title: Ardhanarishvara - UNION
Ardhanarishvara---UNION.content:
Fethiye, Turkey

Narrative:
The greatest sin is to think of yourself as weak

Swami Vivekananda

Of the numerous forms of Shiva, Ardhanarishvara is one that has always intrigued me immensely.
Being a Libra I have always found the concept of balance intriguing, integral, and at times infuriating, a state that must be maintained and not achieved.
Also being prone to vices with an addictive personality I have spent a large portion of my life seeking exoteric, or exogenous satisfaction and fulfillment in many ways, including romantic love.
My personal experiences with the self-internal discovery of the most ancient techniques of self-realization (which I soon after realized was already immortalized in the epic Vigyan Bhairav Tantra; a mindblowing set of techniques explained in a dialogue between Shiva and Parvati) triggered ecstatic states and the experience of Samadhi. It was then I found True Love, even though I had long since found my eternal counterpart on this planet. It was that true self-love and eternal love and gratitude to all beings that catalyzed a deeper kind of love for my graceful goddess Elgin.
Shiva and Shakti, united, in union within the eternal self: This was it. Ultimate ecstasy and transcendent bliss. It was something to be realized and experienced within. And only when it is realized within does that tantric true union create a fusion of two lovers into one, and then into none.
This is an experiment I decided to try.
Sometimes my workflow of creation is to render out a plain model in 3D software and then work from that base in several different pieces of software to obtain a unique synthesis that becomes a kind of digital, personal expression.
This time I decided to use the base “model” or image from an AI-generated image via Mid journey, effectively using it as a tool substituted for 3D software.
It was a very interesting experience as the AI generator creates a “complete” image in itself, especially in relation to lighting, values and depth.
I also found difficulties in this specific workflow to “transcend” the AI-generated style and feel. I especially had the need to recreate the eyes, mouth and certain facial features.
All in all it was a fun experience. I am very interested in your thoughts, ideas and feedback on the process and result. Feel free to comment, and I appreciate your time and support.

Asteroidea-Venusia.title: Asteroidea Venusia
Asteroidea-Venusia.content:
Alanya Turkey

Narrative:
I had an interesting dream today; I was strolling on a beach under a magenta lit sky, I knew this place to be Venus. On the rocks a small psychedelic starfish
with many blinking eyes beckoned me towards it. As I picked it up, it began sort of melding into my hand and established a telepathic communication channel with me.
I felt a very intensely weird sensation in my mind as it uploaded information into my brain, It was “talking” as it filled my mind with pentagonal geometries and
symbolic imagery. It told me that Starfish, and many other forms of pentagonal based life forms including many plants and fruits of the Earth had originated from, Venus, including my own ancestral origins.
It continued explaining that different geometrical based life forms originated from planets corresponding to their energetic geometry and frequency, most of which I
have not totally forgotten. And concluded that Earth was a cosmic breeding ground for various life throughout the galaxy.
When I awoke, I began trying to capture that strange little cosmic starfish which seemed to exude an air of luxurious dignity coupled with a narcissistic streak. 2 Hours later I came up with this image. It does not do it justice, but it was a worthwhile practice to honor the bizarre memory.

Axis-Mundi.content:
Istanbul, Turkey

Narrative:
…From between the realms of heaven and earth, and beyond the motion of the rising and descending sun, emanating from within our core essence arises the Axis Mundi.
As the spider spins her web of interconnection from within her existence, allowing the jewel like formation of dew drops to collect on the threads of perfection, she reveals the infinite dimensions of reflection upon Indra’s net of creation.
We can feel her connection within the currents of air that surround us, as she whispers our name in the wind if we listen, Gaia shifting and shaping the motions of the unconscious and conscious, not unlike a musician playing instruments of passion.
By focusing on a Divine Yantra, we enter the great silence, the space beyond the chattering of our conditioned mind, igniting the transcension of our heart and spirit, revealing the mandalic space of balance which whispers influence and provides us great guidance.
As they say, only a heart as light as feather can ever reach these higher levels, and a fearless heart is needed to transcend our mind into spirit, for what the world needs now more than ever is the warrior spirits to express this inter-connective message, through art, music, poetry, dance, and love, of this transcendental symphony emanating from the Axis Mundi!…
Written by Alistar Valadez

Balancing-Duality.title: Balancing Duality
Balancing-Duality.content:
Alaçatı, Turkey

Narrative:
Balancing Duality is a fusion of visions and dreams on the nature of dual planes. It is a narrative that weaves together the fundamental building blocks of our physical reality. Much like the pistons inside engines, the acid and alkaline within batteries and the positive and negative poles of magnetic fields, duality is the main component in our 3D realm that allows for life cycles and the manifestation of ideas into physical reality.
As much as some of us try to transcend these concepts into a unified state, at times the importance and necessity of a dual existence is lost on us. Although we are spiritual beings, we inhabit physical bodies which forever remain captive to the forces of nature, essentially, the forces of duality.
Our ancestors have provided us with the key to thrive as multi-dimensional beings on a dual plane, and that key is balance. The Buddha’s middle path, The caduceus, The Ankh, Kundalini, Shiva Shakti and many more ancient symbols and concepts allude to this idea of remaining balanced between opposites.
The key is to balance our masculine and feminine, the sun and the moon, the day and night, the hot and cold, the light and the dark. The Phire, is our masculine spark of life, our internal flame but without the water which is the womb, the marine of Mary, our fire engulfs us burning us away. Likewise, without our burning passion, the phire we are engulfed into depths of our spiritual womb.
The key is to use these opposing forces to create, and creating is what we all do best, be it life, art and the reality we immerse ourselves within. Instead of attempting to escape the constraints of polarity and duality, or loose ourselves in constant conflict over what is good and bad, right and left, black or white, we have the choice and opportunity to apply these universal concepts to create a more balanced life for ourselves and thus for the entire planet that we share.
This piece is also an addendum and balancing component to my 2012 artwork “Serpentine Apotheosis”
This artwork was created in approximately 60 hours of work.

Bio-Energetic-Vortexes-No.7---Spirit-(Cr.title: Bio-Energetic Vortexes No.7 - Spirit (Crown Chakra)
Bio-Energetic-Vortexes-No.7---Spirit-(Cr.content:
Fethiye, Turkey

Narrative:
I started this sub-series in the Universal Transmissions style about seven years ago with the artwork titled;
“Bio-Energetic Vortexes No: 1 - Root”
It depicts and visualizes my personal experiences of the Root Muladhara Chakra.
This fascination started a 7-year adventure of creating an image for each Vortex of the 7 Chakra energy center system. Yesterday, that voyage ended, and the cycle was completed as I finished creating;
“Bio-Energetic Vortexes No:7 - Spirit” is a personal rendition of the Sahasrara or “Crown” Chakra.
Though every one of these seven images was challenging to create, this final seventh “seal” was particularly challenging.
This was because I experienced this gateway’s full-blown epic power last year in 2021. During a series of awakenings into states of Samadhi, and in one the darkest places imaginable, during the most trying time of my life.
The profoundly transformative comes to mind.
However, there are and can never be any words for that luminously simple state of being—childlike innocence and wonder paired with Godlike awareness and wisdom.
The artwork “Spirit” is not an interpretation of Samadhi. It is a visual journal entry into my intimate experience of the “Thousand Petal Lotus” opening.
It is a homage to my experience of basking in the glory of divine consciousness.
The Gnostic current flowed strong. I had many realizations and personal awakenings, but what stuck with me was that Joy is the seed or center of suffering. Joy is such a preciously innocent and beautiful thing it had to be encased and “protected” by many onion-like layers of suffering, pain and misery.
When one willfully surrenders into the heart of that pain and suffering, that seed of joy would then bloom and transform both the pain and the person.
Joy and misery are different sides of the same coin.
I am clarifying the presence of “Kundalini Serpents Ida” and “Pingala” in this artwork.
Something else I realized was that Muladhara is not the actual seat of Kundalini.
Although many classic descriptions portray “Muladhara Chakra” as the root that awakens Kundalini as it rises up the spinal column.
In my experience and later more profound research, I found that the “seat of Kundalini is Sahasrara”.
Muladhara is only a manipulation center or a switch like the other energy centers. Still, it is usually the easiest to turn on. Each chakra is independent, and whichever chakra awakens, the kundalini shakti directly travels towards the root of the mystical tree, the Sahasrara chakra.

Caelestis-Lupus.title: Caelestis Lupus
Caelestis-Lupus.content:
Fethiye, Turkey

Narrative:
The first digital work of 2022 started off as the 27th page of the Universal Transmissions Codex. I had just finished on the previous couple of pages and
had sat down on 27, when my older son Ates, now 6 years old sat down with me, as he always does when I sketch in my notepad, draw or paint or when I
sit in front of the computer to design. He asked me what I was working on and I told him “The Strange Book” and he immediately suggested that the new page should be
of a wolf. This was interesting as I had a wolf/fox image that I had abandoned, or left half done, and he suggested that we use it.
So we preceded to work together on what is now “Caelestis Lupus” and the 27th page of the Universal Transmissions Codex. Many ideas and elements in this piece are his ideas and suggestions as well as some of the encoded texts within the image.
This was a peak bliss experience for both of us. It was such an amazing feeling to work on art together with my son, as he grows and dives deeper into his imagination and feeds his creativity with playful practice. It is a true honor to continue a family tradition to foster the love of art in my children just as my parents did with me.

Cinema-4D.title: Cinema 4D
Cinema-4D.content:
While Cinema 4D wasn’t my initial foray into 3D software, its intuitive nature quickly won me over, becoming my go-to choice over the decades.
I initially explored Cinema 4D while crafting scenes for my award-winning experimental short film “The Insiders”.  during 2003. What captivated me was its non-destructive workflow, seamlessly integrating with Adobe Photoshop and After Effects.
As the years passed, particularly after 2010, I delved deeper into Cinema 4D’s capabilities, although there’s still much for me to discover and master.
In my workflow, Cinema 4D primarily serves as a tool for modeling 3D geometry, scenes, and objects. I then render these assets (see Digital Assets) to be incorporated into my artwork, which I further refine and manipulate in Photoshop.

Copelandian-Paradigm.title: Copelandian Paradigm
Copelandian-Paradigm.content:
Istanbul, Turkey

Narrative:
I created Copelandian Paradigm in 2013. Here I wanted to convey a mental tapestry interwoven with various elements that kept showing up in my visions and experiences with the Copelandia Cyanescens mushrooms over the years. The scene is a complete vision of a reincarnation process realized in hyperspace.
During these particular journeys I would have the distinct impression that we were these eternal hyperdimensional mischevious elven beings that would play around with some sort of recursively fractalized bio-machinery. In hyperspace we would jump into these “machines” and incarnate into fleshly 3D vessels as babies and experience an entire life on “Earth” much like a simulation or game of sorts and return as jolly elves out the other side of the machine as we died on earth. Time was non-existent here in a state of eternal play but the time spent on earth was a profound learning experience every single time.
I love the art of Yoko d’Holbachie and was quite inspired and influenced by some of her art during the time I made Copelandian Paradigm
I created this image over a period of a couple of weeks, putting in about an hour or two of work per day.

Corel-Painter.title: Corel Painter
Corel-Painter.content:
Corel Painter has truly been a game-changer for both my life and my art.
Back in 2011, I began experimenting with ZBrush and my first Wacom tablet. It was likely in a Massive Black class when Android Jones showcased his workflow with Painter that prompted me to dive deep into it.
For me, it served as the perfect bridge after two decades of traditional art, seamlessly transitioning into the realm of digital art. The canvas, the brushes, the patterns – everything felt incredibly authentic. It was truly groundbreaking software, especially for Wacom users. Perhaps that’s why it took me so long to discover it, as I’ve always been more accustomed to using a mouse. The only two places where I use a Wacom tablet are with Corel Painter and ZBrush.
It’s truly remarkable software that has enriched my artistic journey in countless ways.

Cosmic-Ascension.title: Cosmic Ascension
Cosmic-Ascension.content:
Istanbul, Turkey

Narrative:
Created in 2012, Cosmic Ascension is a very large highly detailed piece
This is an example of how a vision may flood your consciousness in the most mundane setting, not all visions come during vision quests, dreams, and trance states, and this one came to me during peak traffic on a bus in the middle of the chaos of Istanbul. The image formed in my mind with a powerful presence almost immediately. It was of a human in a meditative trance experiencing some sort of angelic apotheosis, being lifted up into the cosmos by cracking open his mind.
This one took me quite some time to complete due to its massive file size would take me an eternity to open and save, I also re-created most of it several times due to my pc crashing on me. It was frustrating to keep experiencing this over and over again but in the end, I realized it turned out much better than I had previously planned. This entire experience was pivotal in innerstanding the importance of the flow state and the power of letting go.
The image originally included a wider spectrum of colors, leaning towards the purple and magenta hues but I decided to limit the hues to blue to capture the essence of the narrative.

Fethiye.title: Fethiye
Fethiye.content:
Fethiye has become our home, and we’ve been here for over 4 years. It feels like lifetimes have unfolded within these years. It’s where I experienced profound Samadhi experiences and where our family faced significant challenges that nearly tore us apart. It was during this time that I began to detach from my ego identity as a visionary artist.
In Fethiye, I created many seminal artworks, including the birth of the Vitruvian spirit and the completion of the Universal Transmissions codex. I also designed all my clothing and patterns during this period. In just 4 years, an abundance of value and original content was created here.
Yet, all of this pales in comparison to the imminent arrival of our daughter, who will be born in Fethiye. This place holds a sacred and consecrated significance for us—a truly special land where our lives have been profoundly shaped and enriched.

Hakan-Hisim.title: Hakan Hisim
Hakan-Hisim.content:
A few words from Hakan Hısım
The art I create is a reflection of a lifetime of practice, study and distilled experiences. Making art since childhood, my main focus would be on fantastical themes, and countless attempts to capture the essence of my dreams on traditional media. I grew up surrounded by art with parents that instilled in me a deep appreciation for all forms of art. Spending most of my childhood in Australia, and the rest of my youth in Turkey I was fortunate to experience both eastern and western modalities, allowing me to perceive a more balanced view of cultures around the world.
I studied both fine art and cinema, although “Higher Education” did have a few things to offer, I realized ultimately that it tended to stifle my creativity. It was not until years later that I had fully realized that the education system was indeed the epitome of indoctrination. It was during these times I slowly began to drift away from the Contemporary “High Art” scene.
In 2012 I completely transitioned to digital tools to create my artworks and found that I could express my visions and ideas more directly within the digital domain. I have been creating digital art ever since.
I am deeply inspired by the organic technology of nature, various ancient mythologies, syncretism, altered states of consciousness and the infinite complexity of the tryptamine trance state. I have been a student of the mystery traditions, Alchemy and esoteric concepts for most of my life and they have had a very strong impact on fueling my creativity.
My art is mainly manifested by attempting to express the visions I have experienced in deep trance states, dreams and meditations. However some do come about by playing with forms, geometry and symmetry, slowly but surely after some time an image, and a story begins to come to life on the screen and my process is to continue to keep building on that foundation.
The time it takes me to create an artwork varies wildly, depending on my level of access to the flow state and sometimes the subject matter it can take anywhere from 2 hours to over 100 hours of non-stop work.

His artworks are published in “Alchemistas – Beyond the Veil” and The Forbidden Fruit. His art is also featured in the Alchemistas Visionary Art app (which he also created the interface for).
Hakan Hısım is a contributing active artist among such collectives as: Shanti Planti, Technoshaman Collective, The Acidmath Community, SolPurpose, The Concave. He is also the co-founder of Pixel Parellax, specializing in projection mapping, video production and live video performances.
His also created psychedelic fashion and accessories, partnered with Space Tribe, The Headspace and Acidmath Clothing
He is also the Label VJ and Design Artist of BMSS Records, Conclave Records, and Transcendence Records

The holographic mind is a marvel of existence, a labyrinth where every thought, emotion, and sensation converges in a dance of interconnectedness. Like a hologram, each fragment contains the essence of the whole, reflecting the boundless nature of consciousness.
In this intricate web of neurons and synapses, memories shimmer like stars in a vast cosmos, each one a portal to a universe of experience. Here, time is not linear but fluid, allowing us to traverse the past, present, and future with a single thought.
Within the holographic mind, creativity flourishes, as ideas meld and merge to form new realities. It is a realm where imagination knows no bounds, where dreams take flight on the wings of possibility.
Yet amidst this infinite expanse, there is a unity—a sense of oneness that transcends individuality. For in the holographic mind, we are all interconnected, threads woven together in the fabric of existence, each one essential to the whole.

Incendia.title: Incendia
Incendia.content:
Incendia is indeed one of those unique and boutique programs.
Arguably one of the very first 3D fractal generators, perhaps even  Apophysis, it captured my attention back in 2009. Despite being somewhat of a pain to use, it possessed the ability to generate incredibly unique fractal geometry with volumetric lighting.
I would often use it in a similar manner to Cinema 4D, rendering out assets to be remixed later on in my workflow.
While I rarely utilize it nowadays, I’ve already built up a comprehensive archive of assets from my heyday of Incendia use. It remains a cherished part of my artistic journey.

Inward-Convergence.title: Inward Convergence
Inward-Convergence.content:
Istanbul, Turkey

Narrative:
I first started creating Inward Convergence during a very important turning point in my life. It was late 2015, and my radiantly lovely lady was close to giving birth. Spending so much time with her, I began to deeply tap into her feelings and emotions regarding the sacred feminine, giving birth, caring and nurturing, I became quite sensitive to the infinitely subtle emotional energies connected with motherhood, a concept which was quite foreign to me in my past.
During this period I was also experiencing many trance states involving different levels of contact with entities both benevolent and malevolent. It was a weirdly interesting mind state being both very “out there” in abstract realms, Astral voyages and hyper-dimensional realms, and yet also very grounded, connected to the earth, rooted to the womb of my beloved. This contrast bought forth an incredibly creative flow state within me, and I began creating this image of an alien being, which was all too human at the same time, feminine and connected to her emotions.
The scene is my vision of a hyper-dimensional “womb” or safe space, a fertile ground for nurturing and growing all forms of life, be it biological or ideological, it is a place where seeds are planted and have the necessary warmth, devotion, love and emotion required for them to blossom into full blown manifestations. The Alien is also the human, they are both and one conveying the multiple levels of existence, like Russian dolls, many nested within each other.
The creation process of this image also birthed three other artworks, two of which were pivotal in establishing my life as a full time artist and also influencing many of my artworks which were to soon follow. These artworks are “Arcane Opulence”, “Singular Sight” and “Sacred Symbiosis” all of them featuring the “Third Eye of Horus” symbolism embedded in them.
The journey of creating this image somehow connected my higher dimensional awareness which were the experienced entities as reflections of my inner being, to the energy of nurturing and manifesting life and abundance which I beheld though the nurturing and birthing process of my beloved progeny. My son came into this realm powerfully radiant, aware and bought with him the abundance I had bore witness to during these experiences.
Although completed, I did not share or post this image, Instead I continued working on an alternative version for almost another year, which would portray a wider mirrored version with a human woman connecting on the opposite side through
two wormholes which was named “Sacred Symbiosis”
Inward Convergence was created using Photoshop, Painter, Cinema 4D, Zbrush, and Incendia. I did not count the hours I worked on this but it is by far the longest amount of time I have ever put into making an artwork.

Istanbul.title: Istanbul
Istanbul.content:
My time spent in the vibrant and diverse city of Istanbul has been the longest to date, spanning from 2003 to 2017. It’s where I created the majority of my material and artworks.
Much of my creative work was done on the side while I held full-time positions at VFX and film companies, as well as ad agencies.
In 2015, my first child was born, marking a significant milestone in my life. Around the same time, I made the decision to step away from my role as an art director at a full-time job, and become full time artist. This was a pivotal moment for us, signaling our transition to a more natural and less crowded environment.

Know-Thyself.title: Know Thyself
Know-Thyself.content:
Fethiye, Turkey

Narrative:
This is a piece I had wanted to create since 2019 after I had finished “Heal Thyself”
I had first envisioned a figure in a variation of a classic Padmasana posture, but it never felt right for a reason. So I kept putting it off.
After a succession of many powerful, humbling, terrifying, and revealing experiences over the next four years, I finally knew.
I knew that to know oneself, could not be signified solely by the image of a meditating human, Yes meditation had its powerful place in the trinity, but
it was just one aspect, albeit a powerful one.
To know oneself required constant application of the Trivium: Grammar, Logic, and Rhetoric, maintained in balance.
The Trinary pillars of Spirit, Body, and Mind. Manifestation - Intuition - Action
It is the true sovereign; Self Gnosis, intricate awareness of the masks we wear and the roles we choose to engage in. The most important and crucial is
to filter all through the timeless, unyielding knowledge and absolute fact that the ONLY legitimate form of Authority is the authority of the self.

Phantasm.title: Phantasm
Phantasm.content:
Istanbul, Turkey

Narrative:
Phantasm was one of the very first digital artworks I created, It was made in 2012, and it was the very first time used Corel Painter In conjunction with Zbrush, Cinema 4D and Photoshop.
It is a piece heavily inspired by the works of H.P Lovecraft and the Cthulhu Mythos, which I was both fascinated and obsessed with during my teens. It was much later that I had discovered we had access to these dimensions of dark insanity, and early reckless psychonautical exploration dropped me into these shadow realms. They all turned out to be pivotal life lessons on embracing and acknowledging my shadow side and helping me to put it all into balance.
When making this I was constantly reminded how mantra’s and yantra’s just like anything else are just tools that can used to project both positive and negative outcomes and that it was an incomplete view to assume any symbol as just negative or positive, what makes the difference is how the aspirant makes use of them.
Phantasm was created in about 12 hours

Bogtrotter - Jamais Vu

June 8, ‎2012
Details:


























Looking back after all is said and done…
This is not an artwork that I share too often, It’s pretty dark in contrast to most of what I have done over the years.
Phantasm was one of the very first pieces of digital art that I made which was on the level which was acceptable to me to share online.
It was created during a period of my life in which I had an unstoppable flow and gushing inspiration, coupled with wild technique experimentation and constant learning (eating, drinking, breathing tutorials) I made and finished this within one day.
At the time, I was in the middle of creating probably the most widely shared artwork I have ever made: Serpentine Apotheosis. I was somewhere between these two variations at the time:


If remember this piece, then you know I still had a fair bit to get the end result I was after.
I was also almost finished making the music video for Entheogenic’s Body of Light, which took me a year to complete on 3 different rigs.
At the time, I was also working full time as an animator in a large advertising agency, so I pretty much had my plate full ::))
It’s interesting that I randomly chose Phantasm to share today, because that was the very first work I used both Zbrush and painter which was completed. Because I have recently returned to visiting this style and diving much deeper into Zbrush, as I had been using it less and less over the years.
Now, 12 years later looking back, this image doesn’t hold much meaning, I like the design, colors and the environment but apart from that it holds a significant amount of nostalgic value, of the exciting times of finally being able to convey properly and aesthetically with a certain level of skill after a lifetime of painting, and drawing, and to me, failing miserably at it. It reminds me of a time in life in which I was finally turning pro.
The meaning it held back then was memories of hyper-spatial realms, and various creatures that inhabited those realms, not all benevolent. Very interestingly, some of the creatures, like the ones in this artwork, were extremely similar to the creatures I would encounter in my own inner world I had created when I was around 2–3 years old; a place called “Inshallah”.
That is another story for another day, but I promise I will get back to it someday soon, as it hold some value and is worth being told.

Renouncing-Redemption.title: Renouncing Redemption
Renouncing-Redemption.content:
Istanbul, Turkey

Narrative:
Renouncing Redemption was created in late 2015 very soon after the birth of our amazing little boy. It marks an important period of my life, where I made several conscious decisions to change and upgrade my lifestyle from removing meat from my diet and evolving meditation practices to reconnecting with the spiritual art of Alchemy.
Renouncing Redemption is exactly what the name implies; a renunciation of a lifetime of Judeo-Christian programming. As a new father It was of utmost importance to me to raise my child with the awareness that he did not need external gratification, nor did he need a being that was imposed on his life to save and redeem him, like all of us he was born a magnificent Godling.
During the time I was making this one I was deeply immersed in the Sophianic Gnostic Teachings primarily though The Nag Hammadi Library and later moved onto studying the works of John Lash. “Not in His Image: Gnostic Vision, Sacred Ecology, and the Future of Belief” is a great book that tells the forgotten tale of the disappearance of the mystery schools throughout the world and the unhinged genocide of the “Pagan” people and the near destruction of the age old Gnostic Traditions.
The vision is a fusion of both a dream and meditation session, projecting a human who is dwarfed by massive structures which represent many aspects of the Abrahamic religions, the person although seeming tiny by comparison stands strong and unwavering against the onslaught of messianic ideology.
This piece was create in a space of a couple of days, totally immersed in the flow state and buzzing with the new arrival to our tribe.

Making of “Sacred Symbiosis”

I have worked on this image for around 2 years now. It took quite a while to mature but I am happy with the results. The process also taught me a lot on and the project bore several different fruit, all maturing in their own unique ways and realms. The entire process also inspired me to create several other artworks that were closely related with this image and its offspring.
I would like to share the broad strokes over several years of its evolution here with you:


It was about here when I started creating the alchemical sigil behind the aliens head that I stopped for a while, sidetracked and engulfed by the sigil, which eventually took on a life of its own turning into “Arcane Opuelnce” which you can see below

I then incorporated it back into the original image in several parts

Then continued working on it for a while during my free time:

After a while, I decided to flip the image:

I was happy at this point in the image when I decided to do something quite extreme to it, Here is “Inward Convergence”

And this is what happened after my decision to take it further:
I knew this was going to take a while until it started to look good again so I put quite alot of more hours into it:

and then a whole lot more!

True Beauty is an inner consciousness of bliss (Ananda) where the mind reflects our radiant cosmic inner Being.
Beauty unveils the dynamism of creativity, aligned with a higher mysticism, idealism, harmony, and wisdom.
When our hearts, minds, and expressions are in sync with the cosmic rhythms, we draw our awareness into the bliss and beauty of Mother Earth and Mother Nature extending into the unknowable Vast beyond.
A contemplative heart lures the Divine into all our experiences from the ground to the sky.
Satyam Shivam Sundaram literally means: Truth - Divinity - Beauty
And I am beyond honored and fortunate to share my life with Truth, Divinity, and beauty incarnate in physical form:
The powerful woman who is my flame and graceful mother of my two children.
The fortunate people who know her realize this image is a pale comparison of her beauty and character, but this is the best I could do for now.
Thank you, my love, my life for you eternal presence, love, and inspiration.

Serpentine-Apotheosis.title: Serpentine Apotheosis
Serpentine-Apotheosis.content:
Istanbul, Turkey

Narrative:
The creation of Serpentine Apotheosis marks a turning point in my life as an artist. It was the definitive final stroke which pulled me out of traditional media and pulled me into the digital domain.
It is an image close to my heart and soul and also a catalyst which eventually allowed for me to become a full time artist.
The scene is a amalgam of many visions that I had been experiencing for several years within the tryptamine trance state. A divine feminine presence, wise, sexy and frightening at the same time. This cosmic lady, was somehow Mother Aya, Shiva’s Shakti, and the Medusa all contained in one singular form. I watched bedazzled as she created and destroyed galaxies and nebula’s as she danced the cosmic spiral of infinity.
At the time I was working on this I was also reading a book by Jeremy Narby: The Cosmic Serpent: DNA and the Origins of Knowledge. The book is a journey revealing the cosmic serpent throughout the cultures of the world and its connection to the DNA helix. My encounters with Mother Aya always were accompanied by the cosmic serpent weaving in and out, sharing the knowledge and leading the way. The timing was perfect and subconsciously I began to work the theme of the Cosmic Serpent into this visual narrative.
The image took me several weeks to complete and as usual most of that time consisted of fine-tuning the final image.
When I had completed the image I felt I needed to share it, and created a Facebook account in order to do so. At the time I was unknown as an artist with a tiny audience to share the image with. I also applied to a competition to be published in the visionary art book: Alchemistas - Beyond the Veil which resulted in a lot of exposure, the image went viral and was shared and posted beyond any of my expectations, and was in turn published in the book.

Singular-Sight.title: Singular Sight
Singular-Sight.content:
Istanbul, Turkey

Narrative:
Take the polarity of your perception and merge it into wholeness.
The Eye of Ra / Horus symbol has been used since antiquity to signify the Pineal Gland.
From my knowledge the Third Eye and the Pineal Gland are very different things and are not interchangeable.
The Third Eye of Horus / Ra is a modified version that plays more on the dualism and triplicity of our existence.
This image includes dualistic symbols such as the Sun and Moon, Yin and Yang, Black and White. It also includes symbolism
alluding to our dualistic world that is embedded within a larger trinary reality.
The central pupil that resembles a camera lens is a reference to the direct Plagiarization / Inspiration of the spiritual aspects of our bodies into the physical world.
The Pine cone obviously symbolizes an activated Pineal Gland.
The undecipherable text is a reference to ineffable experiences and ancient words of power and manifestation that our ancestors liked so much to play with.
The Tri-force and triangular symbols all refer to the Trinary nature of the self (Good / Bad / Neutral) as opposed to the classical dualistic interpretation of reality.
The balanced cross is the Alchemical symbol for “Earth” and of course the four elements.
Fractal texture by Martin Stebbing
Hexagonal pattern by Olly Balsom (A Thousand Errors)

Temple-of-Scintillating-Sights.title: Temple of Scintillating Sights
Temple-of-Scintillating-Sights.content:
Alaçatı, Turkey

Narrative:
Once in a while I get completely engorged in the flow state. Creating “Temple of Scintillating Sights” was such an experience.
During my morning meditation, this vision came to the forefront of my consciousness, some sort of ancient Egyptian Goddess, perhaps a variation of Isis with fractalized limbs, playing with light and creating impossible objects with powerful guttural words of power that seemed almost primordial in the sense that they transcended all ideas of time and space. There was a profound sense of witnessing physical manifestation through the use of vibration and frequency.
Soon After I sat down and started trying to capture its essence in a frenzy. The image took about 8 hours to complete over a period of 32 hours.
During that period I was also reading several books on Kemetan wisdom and Ancient Egypt, namely The Sirius Mystery and Metu Neter. Both books have a direct influence on my inspiration for this piece, especially Metu Neter which is a profoundly deep dive into Ancient Kemetan traditions, the origins of humanity and its various religions. The book ties together the peoples of ancient Egypt and the Dravidian Hindu cultures of Southern India. Looking back, It seems I subconsciously fused elements of both cultures together to create this piece.
Interestingly, when I shared this image with a few of my friends several of them were slightly shocked as they had seen a very similar vision in their dreams the previous night.

History is the shock wave of eschatology. In other words, we are living in a very unique moment, ten or twenty thousand years long, where an immense transition is happening. The object at the end of and beyond history is the human species fused into eternal tantric union with the superconducting Overmind/UFO. It is that mystery that casts its shadow back through time. All religion, all philosophy, all wars, pogroms, and persecution happen because people do not get the message right. There is both the forward-flowing casuistry of being, causal determinism, and the interference pattern that is formed against that by the backward-flowing fact of this eschatological hyperobject throwing its shadow across the temporal landscape. We exist, yet there is a great deal of noise. This situation called history is totally unique; it will last only for a moment, it began a moment ago. In that moment there is a tremendous burst of static as the monkey goes to godhood,as the final eschatological object mitigates and transforms the forward flow of entropic circumstance.

Inspired by Trans-dimensional Linguistics, Esoteric literature on Out of Body Experiences, Dimensional Travel and the Akashic Records.
Kadmon comes from ‘Aveer Qadmon’, meaning ‘primitive air’ or Azoth. Thoth tells us that the Azoth was the substance in which Prima Matra or First Matter was formed. He also states that the Adam Kadmon was a two-fold manifestation:
1) A divine pattern or schematic which is a ‘Light Body’ of macrocosmic proportions
2) A formulation of that sacred patterning into a being that was supra-physical, and from which the ‘Adamic Race was spawned.
From the Azoth or primitive air in which the supernal world was created, the Adam Kadmon took substance as the ‘Kosmic Man’.

Universal-Transmissions-XI---Vitruvian-S.title: Universal Transmissions XI - Vitruvian Spirit - Seeding the new renaissance
Universal-Transmissions-XI---Vitruvian-S.content:
Fethiye, Turkey

Narrative:
I want to make a clear statement regarding this artwork as I feel It could be misunderstood and misconstrued in these tumultuous times when the meanings of many concepts in our global culture have been subverted, hijacked and at times inverted.
This piece is not about gender, it is not about the superiority of any gender or role, It contains a message of balance, of the power of the divine feminine and masculine and of the balanced trinity of male female and the androgen within us all.
This is a homage to the masters of antiquity who have inspired generations to create and innovate, it is a celebration of the human spirit and imagination.
We have the capacity to be the fool, the jester, the joker. We have the will and power to either be a slave or a sovereign being, we can either be puppets controlled by the invisible threads of “would be controllers” or we can rise up to claim our birthrights as sovereign monarchs of our own individual consciousness.
The choice is ours, and always has been. The year 2020 was a clear wake-up call for humanity to rise up and take responsibility for ourselves and our place in the cosmos. I firmly believe have risen to the challenge and are forging our new path as navigators of the cosmic ocean.
We are the exemplar, the Immaculate Conception, the apex being, we are the Mercurial Bodhisattva, we are the Kwisatz Haderach.
I know this is a very bold statement, but it rings true, and I wanted to create something to inspire to seed the new Renaissance into a new golden age of human ingenuity, of sustainable innovation and of true balance.
I was going to acknowledge the genius contemporaries who are alive right now and are actively working to reshape our world into something we truly deserve. There are too many names to mention, and making a list of influences could lead to favoritism and in all honesty I would probably have forgotten to mention many who have made a mark on our culture. You all know who you are, and I have the utmost respect and admiration for all of you.
Wholeness, balance and infinite gratitude to all of you.

Venus-Exalted.title: Venus Exalted
Venus-Exalted.content:
Istanbul, Turkey

Narrative:
Endless thanks and gratitude to the Mystic Poet Alistar Valadez:
…”Deep within a mystical vision there was a face within an image, she said my name is Venus as she showed herself engaged in a battle on a cosmic scale for a position, and she is reaching out to mortal men and women for help in reinvigorating an inner connection to empower our spirit! For we cannot deny that ignorance and unconscious darkness still surround our planet and collective consciousness. Just like in ancient stories, the snake wants to bring us knowledge that separates us from the dark lords who enslave our fellow brothers and sisters. They say as above so below, and it seems that on a cosmic level, the feminine is still over dominated just like man lived previously on the medieval level. It was not long ago women couldn’t even vote in some countries, and notice how women are still put down even today in certain areas of the world as if it is normal, which IT still reflects as a mirror on a cosmic level. Still, great spirits can see how treating others as equals is far more beneficial in creating a new world vision of being exalted! If we cannot even do it here, how could we expect it to happen in the outer cosmic ocean!? So we each have our calling, we each have our mission, and every little bit of expressed energy towards the awareness of this process is how we will slowly make it beyond the unconscious repeated patterns. Just like with the perfect song, a passionately expressed message or image can activate new layers of perception! Before witnessing this inspiration our unconscious thoughts can remain locked on a completely different level of vibration, but just one spark can activate a new flame of vision and inspire change to arise from within. We know what is right, and we know our time to rise is now, when we are faced with are darkest moments it is in that space expansion can be found to empower us. Looking up at night we can see Venus is one of the brightest objects like a diamond in the sky, we can see the brilliance of her radiance outshine within the darkness, serving as inspiration that we too can be empowered just as Venus Exalted!”

Zbrush.title: Zbrush
Zbrush.content:
ZBrush has been an absolute game-changer for me. In fact, it’s probably still the most enjoyable piece of software I’ve ever used.
It revolutionized how I approached my compositions, transforming my workflow and elevating the color, texture, and depth of my 3D models and compositions.
ZBrush was also the primary reason I started using a Wacom tablet. It became to 3D what Corel Painterwas to 2D—a fundamental shift in how I approached my art.
Although I primarily use it to enhance almost everything I do in 3D, I rarely use it as a standalone tool. However, I’m intrigued by the idea of exploring its standalone capabilities further.
